body.title: Memory/habit unified schema — payload-as-program, START_AT, branch-to-ID
body.result: All 3 pieces shipped (verified 2026-04-19 audit). (1) payload-as-program: node_executor.execute_node reads bytecode cells from memory.payload; 12 coding engrams live. (2) branch-to-ID: BRANCHIF opcode targets another memory_id or memory_id#trigger syntax (D296). (3) START_AT as trigger: memory.metadata.triggers is {trigger_name: cell_name}; multi-trigger memories routing to shared or distinct cells is the mechanism — no schema change needed. Design doc issue-335.csb.txt framed START_AT as a new timestamp column, which contradicts the 'memory schema never changes, use metadata/triggers' rule — doc deleted as part of this close.
body.description: GitHub issue #335. Imported from GH audit — needs triage.
